failedAssertions.reason: Session Recordings section renders correctly (heading, grid, labeled cards with 'Cookie Consent — Privacy Sensitive' etc.), and source code contains <video controls preload='metadata'>, but the 37-byte mock placeholder .webm files are not valid webm content for browser decoding. Browsers trigger HTML5 media error events causing the onError handler to replace all <video> elements with 'Video unavailable' error state. Fix needed: MockBrowserAuditProvider must produce valid minimal webm files (200+ bytes with proper EBML header, Segment, and Track elements) so browsers can at least accept the file without a decode error.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for Browser and API surfaces with isolation rules, pre-created test data IDs, key URLs, and session naming conventions
Documented that PersonaDiffPage route is /diff not /persona-diff

frictions.description: SubmitPage scenario 'Cancellation Flow' sends 'cancellation_flow' to API but backend expects 'subscription_cancellation', causing 422 validation error
Mock placeholder .webm files (37 bytes) are not valid webm content for browser decoding, causing all <video> elements to show error state
PersonaDiffPage route is /diff not /persona-diff as documented
